title: Airoh Commander 3

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Reinforced Polymer (CFRP) Shell with ABS Impact Liner
specs.strap_type: Quick-Release Magnetic Buckle with Adjustable D-Ring

technical_analysis: The Airoh Commander 3 utilizes a proprietary multi-density EPS liner system engineered to absorb high-velocity impact energy while maintaining structural integrity under rotational forces. The shell construction employs a hybrid carbon fiber and fiberglass weave pattern, significantly reducing overall mass without compromising the rigidity required for ECE 22.06 compliance. This material choice allows for an aggressive aerodynamic profile that minimizes drag coefficients at highway speeds.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of Italian design heritage and modern safety engineering with the Airoh Commander 3. Its sleek, aggressive styling features sharp lines and a distinctive visor geometry that commands attention on the track or the street. The helmet is designed for riders who demand uncompromising protection without sacrificing style.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Airoh Commander 3 full-face helmet featuring ECE 22.06 certification, lightweight carbon fiber construction, and superior aerodynamics for serious riders.
